meaning: n.美国国际商用机器公司
examples: IBM is considered the bellwether stock on Wall Street.
The Boston-owned software company became a wholly-owned subsidiary of IBM.
The shake-up aims to recast IBM as a federation of flexible and competing subsidiaries.
He then took a sales job at IBM, envisioning he would someday run the place.
Half a century ago, IBM and organized labor were both monoliths of power and influence in America.
